scripts.setup: npm run setup:env && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web"
scripts.preview:web: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run start -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
